title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google introduced Gemma 4 12B, a multimodal model with unified encoder-free architecture for text, vision, and audio. It runs on consumer laptops with 16GB VRAM, supports local inference via LiteRT-LM, Ollama, and AI Edge Gallery, and includes multi-token prediction drafters to reduce latency.
